name: Astria Pickleball Club
description:
We are thrilled to announce our Club is finally open! Thank you to the Ellensburg Community for your patience and the warm welcome you have given us. We are excited and proud to be part of this amazing community of Pickleball fans and look forward to seeing you all at the Club.

If you have questions, please reach out to us at info@astriapickleball.com
Link to the club page https://astriapickleball.com/pages/club-information

name: Barn-o-Rama
description: Come play pickleball at Barn-o-Rama in Ellensburg, WA! There is 1 indoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Central Washington University
description: Central Washington University is a place to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 8 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Cle Elum Roslyn High School
description: Cle Elum Roslyn High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cle Elum, WA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: EPiC Courts
description: EPiC Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Morgan Middle School
description: Morgan Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Mountain View Park
description: Mountain View Park is a place to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: RecWell
description: RecWell is a place to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Suncadia Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Suncadia Resort in Cle Elum, WA! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the court. The court is private.

name: Wellness Hour
description: Wellness Hour is a place to play pickleball in Ellensburg, WA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights.
